creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=46ce086c7130aedb8b349864afaf938489d070de

commit 46ce086c7130aedb8b349864afaf938489d070de
Author:     Matthias Fechner <mfechner@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-11-01 21:38:08 +0000
Commit:     Matthias Fechner <mfechner@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-11-12 05:54:51 +0000

    Mk/Uses: default version for nodejs

    If a port depends on node, a simple:
    USES= nodejs
    can be added. It is also possible to define a specific version:
    USES= nodejs:14
    Use as current version the latest LTS version of node.

    PR:                     259783
    Differential Revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D32790

 Mk/Uses/nodejs.mk (new)    | 60 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk |  5 +++-
 UPDATING                   | 19 +++++++++++++++
 3 files changed, 83 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)
